description: Instantly is cold email software for sending outbound at scale, with unlimited sending inboxes, automated warm-up, and lead and reply management in one workspace.
overview: Instantly lets outbound teams connect unlimited sending inboxes, warm them automatically, and run high-volume campaigns while managing leads and replies from a single inbox.
what_is: Instantly is a cold email platform built for volume without wrecking deliverability. Teams connect many sending inboxes, keep them warm automatically, and launch campaigns from one workspace, with a unified inbox for handling the replies that come back.

It is aimed at agencies and outbound teams that send a lot and need their domains to stay healthy. Warm-up, sending limits, and campaign tooling sit together, so the operational side of scaling cold email is handled in one place rather than across separate apps.

Beyond sending, Instantly adds lead sourcing and reply management so a campaign runs end to end. It is focused on cold email execution and deliverability rather than full CRM or marketing automation, and it fits alongside those tools in a go-to-market stack.
